text.source_text: कथं पुनः परमेश्वरपरिग्रहे प्रादेशमात्रश्रुतिरुपपद्यत इति , तां व्याख्यातु मारभते —
text.transliteration_iast: kathaṃ punaḥ parameśvaraparigrahe prādeśamātraśrutirupapadyata iti , tāṃ vyākhyātu mārabhate —

translation.literal_translation: How the span-measure statement is coherent when the Supreme is taken as referent - this now begins to be explained:
translation.technical_translation: Transition introducing justification of pradesa-matra language under Brahman-reference.
translation.interpretive_note: Introduces the interpretive sequence of alternative explanations.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Transition centers on explaining why such wording can still refer to Brahman.
The challenge is to preserve this referent while accounting for measure-language.
Marks shift from established conclusion to modality-specific reconciliation.
Bridges direct-Vaisvanara conclusion into pradesa-matra interpretive sub-debate.

uncertainty_notes: Curated in contiguous S02 pass with stable cadence and inferential-tag schema.
A later philological pass should revisit pradesa-matra, sampatti, and recensional lexical correspondences in records 1.2.071-1.2.078.
